name: pheno-cdylib-bridge
absorption_note: Rust C-ABI cdylib exposing thegent-memory MemoryPort trait to Go (forgecode) and other FFI consumers. Absorbed into pheno monorepo as crates/pheno-cdylib-bridge; cargo check + 4/4 FFI smoke tests pass. Source repo archived on GitHub.
note: Absorbed 2026-07-17 into pheno monorepo as crates/pheno-cdylib-bridge. Build/test green.
